name: Heart of Romaine and Watercress with Basil Anchovy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 hearts of romaine lettuce (split in half)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour an equal amount of Basil Anchovy Sauce onto each individual salad plate.
2. Spread the sauce evenly across the plate.
3. Arrange 4 endive spears on the plate so they are facing in the same direction.
4. Place one halved heart of romaine lettuce on top of the endive spears, with their tips visible.
5. Position the watercress at the stem end of the romaine.
6. Lay the tomato quarters on top of the romaine.
